Title: Information Security Policies
Implementation_Details: Governed by national mandate and SOC playbooks

Title: Information Classification
Implementation_Details: Data classification matrix defines RESTRICTED and CONFIDENTIAL tiers

Title: User Access Provisioning
Implementation_Details: RBAC and ABAC managed via Keycloak and OPA

Title: System and Application Access Control
Implementation_Details: 100% MFA enforced. Istio L7 authorization policies restrict endpoints.

Title: Cryptographic Controls
Implementation_Details: Vault Transit Engine for Biometrics. TDE for databases. mTLS for transport.

Title: Operational Procedures and Responsibilities
Implementation_Details: Fully automated via ArgoCD GitOps pipelines.

Title: Logging and Monitoring
Implementation_Details: Hash-chain logger in S3 WORM. SIEM with 7-year retention.

Title: Network Security Management
Implementation_Details: Cilium eBPF Default Deny. Micro-segmentation enforced.

Title: Information Security Incident Management
Implementation_Details: SOC Elastic SIEM + TheHive + 72h RGPD playbook.

Title: Information Security Continuity
Implementation_Details: Monthly automated DB restore testing in GitHub Actions.
